title: 有馬記念の後に・磨斧作針

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That was hardly a walk in the park, though I
suppose I shouldn't be surprised.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Still, I demonstrated my strength convincingly
enough. I can face the senior races with my head
held high.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now, answer me this. The three crowns I long
sought are already mine—what prize do you
suppose I should seek to claim next?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Precisely. Now that I'm a senior, ambitious
classic-year racers and my capable
contemporaries alike will all seek to oust me from
my throne.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I shall need a grand and storied shield with which
to defend my honor.
choice_data_list:
Sounds like we should aim for the spring Tenno
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: My thoughts exactly.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
3,200 meters is a grueling distance, but it
presents the perfect opportunity to demonstrate
my prowess as a stayer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And victory in the Tenno Sho grants a particular
prestige.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Let us honor the suffering and perseverance of
our forebears with a stunning victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so we set our sights on the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We return to the waiting room to find...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You raced well today, President.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ah, Air Groove. Have you been waiting for me?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Only to pass on my congratulations. Now that
that's done, I ought to head back home.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Is it my imagination, or do you look a little under
the weather?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Me?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Your complexion strikes me as somewhat pale. As
though you've been missing sleep... or perhaps
meals.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Apologies. My student council duties have been
taking up a lot of my time.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: It's not like you to let them get out of hand.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This year's New Year's party has required more
paperwork than usual, and attending to it has
been somewhat time-consuming.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From what I can gather, it sounds like Air Groove
has been in charge of organizing the New Year's
party that the student council runs.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Why didn't you say something? Let me take
charge of this.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Forgive me, President...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to apologize. For all the virtue of
hard work, you have been pushing yourself too
much.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You may be exceptional, but even you have your
limits, especially in this busy season. Surely you
can lean on me once in a while.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: President...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now, I ought to attend to student council
business.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Fortuitously enough, my last great task of the
year has just concluded. Excellent timing, if I do
say so myself.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I have a request for you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Take care of Air Groove. See that she gets some
rest.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And could you pick out something for us to eat
while I finish things up here?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: No, there's no need for that. I can do it myself.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Between your fatigue-addled mind and my
trainer's ample experience, which would you say is
the more suitable candidate?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Point taken.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Then my request stands. Trainer, if you would.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a light snack, Symboli Rudolf and Air
Groove head back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The New Year's party ends up a great success and
is very much appreciated by the Umamusume
staying at school over the holidays.
